prompt: Create this directory structure: 'project/src/lib/', 'project/src/utils/', 'project/tests/unit/', 'project/tests/integration/'. Write these files: 'project/src/lib/parser.ts' containing 'export function parse(input: string) { return input.split("\\n"); }', 'project/src/lib/validator.ts' containing 'export function validate(data: unknown): boolean { return true; }', 'project/src/utils/helpers.ts' containing 'export const VERSION = "2.0.0";', 'project/tests/unit/parser.test.ts' containing 'test("parses newline delimiter")', 'project/tests/integration/app.test.ts' containing 'test("full workflow integration")'. Now use search_files to find which file contains 'VERSION'. Read that file and report the version number. Then use directory_tree on 'project/' to show the full structure.
rationale: Tests multi-step dependency — create dirs, write files, search, read result, tree verification
